title: Hug & Marry
description: Adds hugging, marriage, and relationship mechanics to Minecraft servers.
body:
# Hug & Marry – Social Interactions & Relationships

Hug & Marry is a server-side mod/plugin that adds social interactions and relationship mechanics to Minecraft.

Available for both Fabric and PaperMC, it brings lightweight social features to multiplayer servers without requiring any client-side installation.

From simple hugs to marriage requests, chat hearts, and optional private couple commands, Hug & Marry makes player interaction feel more personal and connected.

---

## Features
- `/hug` – Hug the nearest player
- `/hug top` – View the players with the most hugs
- `/marry <player>` – Send a marriage request
- `/marry accept` / `/marry deny` – Accept or decline marriage requests
- Marriage System – Players can marry, divorce, and manage their relationship
- Marriage Info – Shows partner, since-date, and PvP status
- PvP Toggle – Control PvP between married players
- Chat Hearts – Married players get a heart prefix in chat
- Private Commands – `/kiss` and `/cuddle` can be enabled for one configured pair
- Admin Commands – `/marry list [page]`, `/marry info <player>`
- Persistent Data – Marriage data is saved across restarts
- Optional Hug Regeneration – Can be disabled in the config
- Configurable Private Commands – Can be disabled entirely or limited to one specific pair
- Improved Command Autocomplete
- Available for Fabric & PaperMC (`1.21` - `1.21.11`)

---

## Perfect for
- Survival servers
- Roleplay communities
- Friend groups
- Servers focused on social interaction

Hug & Marry brings players closer together. Literally.
